message:
fix: data race guards in rotation, conflicts, pipeline, watcher, rotator

- rotation.go: hold mu lock for processExpiredPending/ConfirmRotation map
  access; clone data before I/O after unlock; fix nil handoffSummary panic
- conflicts.go: atomic.AddUint64 for conflictIDCounter (was bare ++)
- pipeline/executor.go: stateMu guards around CurrentStep and Errors
- file_reservation.go: wg.Add(1) inside lock to prevent Stop+Wait race
- account_rotator.go: snapshot state fields under lock before using after
  unlock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ import (
 	"sort"
 	"strings"
 	"sync"
+	"sync/atomic"
 	"time"
 
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/agentmail"
@@ -392,8 +393,8 @@ var conflictIDCounter uint64
 
 // generateConflictID generates a unique ID for a conflict.
 func generateConflictID(pattern string) string {
-	conflictIDCounter++
-	return fmt.Sprintf("conflict-%d-%d-%s", time.Now().UnixNano(), conflictIDCounter, sanitizeForID(pattern))
+	seq := atomic.AddUint64(&conflictIDCounter, 1)
+	return fmt.Sprintf("conflict-%d-%d-%s", time.Now().UnixNano(), seq, sanitizeForID(pattern))
 }
 
 // sanitizeForID creates a safe ID component from a string.

@@ -723,18 +723,23 @@ func (r *AccountRotator) RotationCount() int {
 func (r *AccountRotator) OnLimitHit(event LimitHitEvent) (*RotationRecord, error) {
 	r.mu.Lock()
 	state := r.getOrCreateState(event.SessionPane)
+	// Snapshot fields under lock to avoid reading while another goroutine writes
+	currentAccount := state.CurrentAccount
+	rotationCount := state.RotationCount
+	lastRotation := state.LastRotation
 	r.mu.Unlock()
 
 	r.logger().Info("[AccountRotator] limit_hit_received",
 		"session_pane", event.SessionPane,
 		"agent_type", event.AgentType,
 		"pattern", event.Pattern,
-		"current_account", state.CurrentAccount,
-		"rotation_count", state.RotationCount)
+		"current_account", currentAccount,
+		"rotation_count", rotationCount)
 
-	// Check cooldown
-	if r.isCooldownActive(state) {
-		elapsed := time.Since(state.LastRotation)
+	// Check cooldown using snapshotted values (already read under lock)
+	cooldownActive := rotationCount > 0 && time.Since(lastRotation) < r.CooldownDuration
+	if cooldownActive {
+		elapsed := time.Since(lastRotation)
 		r.logger().Warn("[AccountRotator] cooldown_active",
 			"session_pane", event.SessionPane,
 			"last_rotation", state.LastRotation,
